cases.prompt: Show me a few design options for this screen, I don't like how it looks.

assertions.text: Generates multiple AI design variants to explore
Opens a comparison board to view the variants side by side
Collects structured feedback and iterates on the chosen direction

cases.prompt: 이 UI 디자인 변형 여러 개 만들어서 비교해줘.

assertions.text: Runs a standalone visual brainstorm producing several design variants
Iterates based on the feedback collected
